atomic_facts.fact: A white attachment is connected to the front hub of a red stand mixer.
The white attachment has the word 'KitchenAid' embossed on its side.
Two cylindrical metal grating drums with black tops are visible in the foreground.
One grating drum has larger slicing holes while the other has smaller shredding holes.
The background contains out-of-focus red, yellow, and green objects resembling vegetables.

spatial: The red mixer base is on the far left, connected to a white attachment extending towards the center-right. In the immediate foreground on the left are two metal grating drums. The background is a soft-focus blur of colorful produce on the right.
state_changes: Mixer base, grinder attachment, and drums displayed stationary on counter
